home.heroDescriptionShort: Track clicks, conversions and revenue in one dashboard. See what really drives profit and scale winning channels faster.
home.moneyFromTitle: Know exactly where money comes from
home.moneyFromDesc: LehkoTrack attributes every sale to a source, campaign and creative so you can scale what works and stop wasting budget.
home.integration5minDesc: Add one script and start collecting click and conversion data instantly. Works with any storefront or CMS.
home.integrationBullet2: Works via code snippet or GTM
home.addToSite: Add this code to your site
home.register30secCardless: Register in 30 seconds. No credit card required.
home.pricingTitle: Simple pricing for teams of any size
home.faqQ1: How does LehkoTrack affect my website loading speed?
home.faqA1: Almost not at all. Our script is optimized and weighs only 2 KB. It loads asynchronously, so it does not delay content rendering for users.
home.faqQ2: Do I need to be a developer to set everything up?
home.faqA2: Not at all. If you can copy and paste text into your website field or use Google Tag Manager, you can set it up in 5-7 minutes.
home.faqQ3: What is Visitor Fingerprint and is it legal?
home.faqA3: It is a technology that identifies a unique visitor without cookies, which are often blocked by browsers. We do not collect personal data and use it only for analytics accuracy.
home.faqQ4: How are you better than standard Google Analytics 4?
home.faqA4: GA4 is powerful, but often too complex for quick decisions. LehkoTrack is built for owners: it shows money and ROMI directly and tracks Instagram Stories and Telegram traffic more accurately.
home.faqQ5: Can I track influencer ads via QR codes?
home.faqA5: Yes. You create a unique link for each influencer and see every scan and every purchase from that link in real time.
home.faqQ6: Can I export my data if I decide to leave?
home.faqA6: Absolutely. You own your data and can export reports to CSV or Excel at any time.
home.faqQ7: Can I connect multiple domains/websites to one account?
home.faqA7: Yes, you can track multiple projects in one account. This is useful for agencies and founders who manage multiple brands.
home.faqHelpTitle: Did not find an answer? We are here to help!
home.faqHelpDesc: Write to us in Telegram and we will help you set up your first project.
home.readyScale: Ready to scale profit, not just traffic?
home.heroHeadline: You see clicks. But do you see profit?
home.heroSubline: LehkoTrack shows real sales, revenue and ROMI for each channel – blogger, ads, email or QR code.
home.heroSubline2: One dashboard. No spreadsheets. No guesswork.
home.heroDescription: Professional affiliate tracking with automatic conversion and revenue tracking. Set up in 2 minutes, works on any site.
home.budget1: You evaluate ads by clicks, not by profit

home.budget3: You have 3–5 different reports instead of one
home.budget5: You don't calculate ROMI per channel
home.valueProp: LehkoTrack brings all traffic sources into one control centre and shows only what matters — sales and profit.

home.featuresSectionSubtitle: From click to purchase — all analytics in one dashboard, no spreadsheets, screenshots or calculators.

consoleCode.title: Console code (Visual Mapper)
consoleCode.subtitle: Select a website and click Get code. On the client website: F12 → Console → paste code → Enter. Code is valid for 10 minutes.

setup.title: Tracker
setup.subtitle: Instructions for installing the tracking system on your site
setup.tipDomain: If you enter the site domain, the system will automatically check whether the tracker is installed. This helps you quickly see if everything works.
setup.siteDomainHint: If you enter a domain, the system will automatically check whether the tracker is installed on the site
setup.apiWarningLocalhost: Currently using localhost:3000 — this is for local development.
setup.apiWarningProduction: For production sites (Netlify, Vercel, your domain) you need to replace localhost:3000 with your production API URL.
setup.httpsCriticalDesc: If your site loads over HTTPS, the API URL must also be HTTPS. Using HTTP will cause a Mixed Content error.
setup.apiWhere: Where to find your API URL? It's the address where your backend is deployed. If you use our service, it's usually https://lehko.space or your domain.
setup.howCheckWorks: How does tracker installation check work?
setup.howCheckWays: The system automatically checks for the tracker in two ways:
setup.verificationPing: Verification ping — the tracker sends a ping every 5 minutes (most reliable method)
setup.htmlCheck: HTML check — the system looks for tracker indicators in the page code
setup.checkTip: Tip: After installing the tracker, wait 5–10 minutes and click Check to update the status.
setup.gtmTip: GTM: If the code is added via Google Tag Manager, the HTML check often won't see the tracker. Open your site in the browser, wait 1–2 min and click Check.
setup.testPage: Testing: Open the test page for detailed tracker verification.
setup.quickHelp: Quick access: To quickly copy the code, click the copy button in the Actions column next to your site. Or click the code icon for a detailed view with instructions.
setup.noSitesHint: Add a site to start tracking tracker installation
setup.trackerNotFound: Tracker not found. What to do:
setup.trackerNotFound1: Make sure the code is installed on all pages of the site
setup.trackerNotFound2: The code must contain your API URL (e.g. https://lehko.space), not localhost
setup.trackerNotFound3: Clear browser and CDN cache (if used)
setup.trackerNotFound4: Wait 5–10 minutes after installation or open the site in the browser, wait 1–2 min and click Check now again
setup.quickCheck: Quick check: Open site → F12 → Console, type window.LehkoTrack — an object should appear.
setup.gtmNote: If using GTM: HTML check often doesn't see the tracker. Open your site in the browser, wait 1–2 minutes and click Check now.
setup.guarantees: The tracker sends a verification ping every 5 minutes. The system automatically tracks all clicks and conversions from your site.
setup.localhostUsePublic: Use a public domain for verification
setup.checkMayTake: Check may take up to 10 seconds
setup.checkHow: The system checks page HTML and verification pings
setup.localhostInCode: Note: The code uses localhost:3000. For production sites, replace with your production API URL (e.g. https://lehko.space).
setup.httpsCriticalShort: Critical: Use HTTPS (not HTTP) for production sites, otherwise the browser will block the script with a Mixed Content error.
setup.siteIdInCode: Site ID already filled in the code
setup.apiInCode: API URL already filled in the code
setup.stepCopy: Copy the code above (copy button top right)
setup.stepOpenHtml: Open the main page HTML file (or CMS admin panel)
setup.stepFindHead: Find the head section (usually at the start of the file)
setup.stepPaste: Paste the copied code — the tracker will automatically spread the tracking ID to other pages
setup.stepReplaceLocalhost: Important: Replace localhost:3000 with your production API URL (e.g. https://lehko.space)
setup.stepSave: Save the file and publish changes to the site
setup.stepVerify: Verify installation: Click Check now in the sites table 5–10 minutes after installation
setup.whereSiteId: Site ID: Shown above in the info block or in the Site ID column in the table
setup.whereApiUrl: API URL: Shown above. For production sites use your production domain (e.g. https://lehko.space)
setup.whereConversions: Conversion settings: Settings button in the sites table — you can set success URL and price there
setup.name: Name
setup.successUrlHint: For Universal tracker: if the current URL contains one of these paths — conversion is counted.
setup.leadButtonNotSet: Not configured. Automatic button text search is used.
setup.leadSelectorHint: How to find: open site → right-click button → Inspect → copy the element's class or id.
setup.cartButtonNotSet: Not configured. Select button via Visual Mapper or enter CSS selector manually.
setup.cartHint: Add to cart button — each click counts as a Cart event.
setup.visualMapperHint: Visual Mapper opens the site in a new tab. Console code — if it doesn't open: copy the code, on the client site F12 → Console → paste code.
setup.staticPriceHint: If set — this price is always used, other methods are ignored.
setup.priceSelectorHint: The tracker will read the number from this element. If not set — auto-search for price near the button (₴, $, etc).
setup.installSubtitle: Two steps — and everything works automatically
setup.autoTrackerIntro: You only need to add the site and paste one line of code. The tracker does the rest:
setup.autoPropagation: Auto-propagation — ID is stored in cookies and automatically added to all links on the site
setup.autoCrossPages: Works across pages — ref and click_id are passed to all other pages
setup.autoFindsButtons: Finds Buy, Order, Pay buttons (ignores Add to cart)
setup.autoSale: Thank-you page (/thank-you, /success) = sale (automatically reads amount from URL)
setup.autoDeferred: Deferred conversion — if the user returns from the thank-you page, the sale is counted
setup.autoAnyBuilder: Works with any builder: Tilda, Wix, WordPress, Shopify, Horoshop
setup.step1Suffix: tab click "Add site" → enter name and domain. You'll get a Site ID.
setup.step2PasteCode: Paste the code on the site
setup.step2Text: Copy and paste on any page of your site (head section). The tracker will automatically spread the tracking ID to all other pages:
setup.tildaWhere: Site settings → More → HTML code to insert in head
setup.wixWhere: Settings → Tracking & Analytics → Custom Code → head
setup.shopifyWhere: Online Store → Themes → Edit code → theme.liquid → before </head>
setup.horoshopWhere: Settings → SEO → Additional code in head
setup.doneIntro: Nothing else to configure. The tracker automatically:
setup.doneList1: Stores tracking ID in cookies (available on all pages of the domain)
setup.doneList2: Adds ref and click_id to all links on the page
setup.doneList3: Detects the thank-you page and counts the sale
setup.doneList4: If the user returns to a page with the tracker — deferred conversion is counted
setup.doneVerify: Check connection status in 1–2 minutes in the My sites tab.
setup.advancedVisual: Visual Mapper — manually set the lead button. Click in the sites table.
setup.advancedSuccess: Success URL — set the thank-you page URL manually. Settings icon → Success page URL.
setup.advancedPrice: Fixed price — set the price manually if auto-read doesn't work.
setup.advancedApi: JS API — call after payment from code:
setup.gtmSubtitle: Install the tracker via GTM — code is ready, just copy
setup.gtmLocalhostDesc: If your site runs over HTTPS, the browser will block requests to http://localhost (Mixed Content). GTM will work when the backend is on HTTPS (e.g. https://lehko.space).
setup.gtmLocalhostTest: For local testing: paste the code directly and open the site via http:// (not https).
setup.gtmStep1: Open GTM → Tags → New → Custom HTML
setup.gtmStep2: Copy the ready code for your site
setup.gtmStep3: Trigger: All Pages → Save → Submit → Publish
setup.gtmStep3Desc: Select the All Pages trigger, save the tag, click Submit and Publish.
setup.gtmAddSiteHint: Add a site in the My sites tab to get code with your ID.
setup.gtmAdvantageTitle: GTM advantage: code automatically on ALL pages
setup.gtmAdvantageDesc: GTM places the tracker on every page of the site (All Pages trigger). You don't need to paste the code in each HTML file separately.
setup.gtmVerify: After publishing wait 1–2 min and check status in the My sites tab.
setup.guideSubtitle: From click to sale — everything automatic
setup.guideFlowCapture: Tracker stores ref in cookies + localStorage + adds to all links
setup.guideFlowSpread: When navigating to other pages, ref is passed via URL and cookies
setup.guideFlowLead: Click on Buy → lead. Monitoring starts
setup.guideFlowSale: Thank-you or confirmation page → sale counted!
setup.howSaleDetected: How is a sale detected (3 ways)
setup.saleMethod1Desc: If URL contains keywords. Automatically reads ?total= and ?order= from URL
setup.saleMethod3Desc: If the user went to the thank-you page (without tracker), then returned — the tracker counts the sale via document.referrer
setup.whatToTellClient: What to tell the client (site owner)
setup.clientPhrase: Paste one line of code on the main page. Nothing else to do — our system will spread the tracking ID to all pages via cookies and links, find purchase buttons and track orders automatically.
setup.verifyDesc: The tracker sends a verification ping every 5 minutes. After installation: Wait 1–2 min and click Check in the sites table. Or open site → F12 → Console → window.LehkoTrack.
setup.deleteSiteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this website?
setup.addSiteError: Failed to add website. Please try again.
setup.codeCopied: Code copied! Open the client site → F12 → Console → paste code (Ctrl+V) → Enter. Select the lead button. Code valid for 10 min.
setup.enterDomainFirst: Please enter the site domain first.
setup.trackerNotConnectedConfirm: Tracker is not yet connected on this site. Visual Mapper requires pixel.js to be installed. Continue?
setup.localhostCheckAlert: Automatic check is not available for localhost sites. Make sure the tracking code is installed on the site and use a public domain for verification.
setup.checkError: Failed to verify site. Make sure the site is accessible from the internet.
